cards.headline: Key people leaving?
cards.text: The decision to leave matures for months. You usually don't know until you get the resignation. Behavera catches it earlier.

cards.text: People don't leave companies. They leave managers. Do you know how yours are doing — from their team's perspective?

cards.headline: Teams not delivering results?
cards.text: Most companies find out at the exit interview. With Behavera, you know every month.

costs.title: How much is not knowing costing you?
costs.subtitle: The decision to leave matures for months. You usually don't know — until the resignation lands on your desk.

cards.label: UNWANTED TURNOVER
cards.text: Replacing one person costs 6–9 monthly salaries. A $3K/mo position? That's $18–27K gone. And that doesn't count the know-how that walks out the door.

cards.text: Disengaged teams have 21% lower profitability. The problem? They look normal — they just don't deliver.

cards.text: 70% of engagement variability depends on the direct manager. One bad manager ruins the entire team.

costs.bottom: Today you guess. Tomorrow you'll know.

items.question: Will it annoy people?
items.answer: No — and that's the whole point. A pulse takes 2 minutes, feels like a natural chat, and people actually enjoy filling it out. 80%+ return rate speaks for itself.

items.question: Does it require complex IT implementation?
items.answer: Not at all. Setup takes 15 minutes. Upload your employee list, choose a channel (email, Slack, WhatsApp), and Behavera handles the rest.

items.question: Is it truly anonymous?
items.answer: Yes, no compromises. Data is aggregated at the team level. No one — not even you — can link a response to a specific person. That's why people answer honestly.

items.question: Will it create more work for managers?
items.answer: The opposite — it saves time. The dashboard shows exactly where the problem is, how serious it is, and what to do about it. No guessing, no spreadsheets, no reports gathering dust.

items.question: What if the results aren't pretty?
items.answer: That's exactly why Behavera exists. If you don't know about a problem, you can't fix it. Discover it before it causes departures — that's where the value is.

items.question: Isn't this just another HR tool?
items.answer: Behavera isn't an HRIS, ATS, or another dashboard with charts. It's a diagnostic tool for company leadership — helping CEOs, HR, and team leads make decisions based on data, not impressions.

items.question: How do you ensure anonymity in a team of 8?
items.answer: Results only display with a minimum number of respondents (configurable). For small teams, data is automatically aggregated to a higher level to preserve anonymity. We take this dead seriously.

about.seoTitle: A Team That Understands People and Data

hero.title: We help leaders build successful organizations where people love to work.
hero.text1: We've always believed that people are the most important part of any company. And yet, the way many organizations work with people still relies on gut feelings rather than real insight. Back in 2018, we set out to change that. We began developing gamified assessments that help leaders uncover the real potential of their people in real-life situations.
hero.text2: But as we worked with more and more leaders, we noticed a pattern. They didn't just want data. They needed support — something quick, clear, and genuinely helpful in their day-to-day leadership. Not another complex report or theory to read through after hours.
hero.text3: So we listened. We brought together our backgrounds in psychology, data science, HR, and AI and teamed up with hands-on entrepreneurs and investors who added real-world leadership and business experience. And that's how Behavera was born.
hero.text4: Today, we're helping leaders shift how they work with their people from hiring to engagement — so leaders can make better decisions, unlock potential, and build workplaces where people actually want to be.

vision.title: When people understand each other, everything else falls into right place.
vision.text: We want to build a world where leaders truly understand their people and know how to lead them in a way that helps organizations thrive — and makes people look forward to work, even on a Friday.

mission.title: We give leaders a simple tool to make smart decisions fast.
mission.text: With Behavera, leaders can quickly and objectively decide who's best suited for which role and effectively tackle the real obstacles holding their teams back.

strengths.title: Discover your strengths — and a job that truly fits you.
strengths.text: Our fun simulation games reveal what you're really good at and help you find a job where you can fully use your potential. You won't want to leave.

chatbot.title: We show only what really matters — and how to improve it.
chatbot.text: Just a few minutes with our chatbot and you'll know what motivates or frustrates your people, how serious it is, and what to do about it.

team.title: Core Team
team.also: We also collaborate with leading psychologists, marketing specialists, and leaders from diverse fields.

security.seoTitle: Your Data, Fully Protected. No Compromises.
security.title: Security & Trust
security.subtitle: Your employees' data deserves the highest level of protection. Here's how we deliver it.

sections.title: Data encryption
sections.text: All data is encrypted at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.3). We follow industry best practices for key management and rotation.

sections.title: GDPR compliance
sections.text: Behavera is fully GDPR compliant. We process data as a data processor under a DPA. All data is stored within the European Union.

sections.title: Anonymity by design
sections.text: Individual responses are never linked to identifiable employees. Results are aggregated at the team level with configurable minimum thresholds to prevent identification in small teams.

sections.title: Infrastructure
sections.text: Our infrastructure runs on EU-based cloud providers with SOC 2 certified data centers. We conduct regular security audits and penetration testing.

sections.title: Access control
sections.text: Role-based access control ensures that only authorized personnel can view specific data. All access is logged and auditable.

sections.title: Data retention
sections.text: You control your data. Export or delete it at any time. We follow strict data retention policies and never share data with third parties.

team-lead.title: They say "it's fine." It's not.
team-lead.subtitle: As team lead, you're closest to your people. But even so, they won't tell you everything. Behavera gives you anonymous truth — before the problem escalates.

problems.text: of employees won't tell their team lead about a problem directly. They fear conflict or consequences.
higher productivity in teams where people feel psychologically safe. Without feedback, you can't build safety.
on average before a team problem surfaces externally. By then it's too late for prevention.
